name: polymath-connector-grafana
description: Grafana connector: MCP for dashboards/datasources + dashboard-snapshot skill that captures a permalinked snapshot for incident timelines and postmortem evidence.

grafanaUrl.title: Grafana base URL
grafanaUrl.description: Full URL to the Grafana instance (e.g. https://grafana.example.com).

grafanaApiKey.title: Grafana service account token
grafanaApiKey.description: Service account token with Viewer (or Editor for snapshots) role on the relevant org.
